```rust
fn main() {
    println!("highlighted");
}
```

## Math

$$
\int_0^1 x^2 \, dx = \frac{1}{3}
$$

## Diagram

```mermaid
graph TD;
  A[Start] --> B{Choice};
  B -->|yes| C[Done];
  B -->|no| A;
```
